eid.dua: May Allah accept from us and from you.
eid.msg: Wishing you and your family a joyful and blessed Eid. May your home be filled with light, laughter and barakah.

nikah.dua: May Allah bless you both and unite you in goodness.
nikah.msg: Congratulations on your Nikah. May Allah fill your marriage with love, mercy and tranquillity, and bless every year ahead.

baby.dua: May Allah make them among the righteous and a coolness to your eyes.
baby.msg: Mabrook on your beautiful new arrival! May Allah make them righteous, healthy and a coolness to your eyes.

ramadan.dua: May this month bring you peace, mercy and barakah.
ramadan.msg: Ramadan Kareem. May this blessed month bring you closer to Allah, and fill your days with peace and your heart with barakah.

birthday.dua: May Allah bless your years with health and iman.
birthday.msg: Happy Birthday! May Allah bless you with many more years of health, happiness and strong iman.

thanks.dua: May Allah reward you with all goodness.
thanks.msg: Thank you, truly. Your kindness did not go unnoticed. May Allah reward you with all goodness.

getwell.dua: May Allah grant you a swift and complete recovery.
getwell.msg: Thinking of you and making du'a for you. May Allah grant you a swift and complete recovery, ameen.

wife.sub: the calm Allah placed in my heart
wife.dua: May Allah preserve our home in love and mercy.
wife.msg: To the calm in my every storm, thank you for the home and peace you bring. I love you, today and always.

husband.dua: May Allah protect you and bless our years together.
husband.msg: Thank you for your patience, your strength and your kindness. Alhamdulillah for you, I am grateful every single day.

mum.dua: May Allah grant you the highest gardens of Jannah.
mum.msg: Thank you for every du'a, every sacrifice and every kindness. May Allah reward you with Jannah, I love you, Mum.

dad.dua: May Allah preserve you and reward your every effort.
dad.msg: Thank you for your strength, your guidance and your quiet sacrifices. May Allah preserve you, I love you, Dad.

friend.headlineEn: A friend for the sake of Allah
friend.dua: May Allah keep us together in this life and the next.
friend.msg: Grateful for a friendship built on something lasting. May Allah keep us close in this life and reunite us in Jannah.
